item.title: Supply chain attacks hit Checkmarx and Bitwarden developer tools
item.description:
Two supply chain attacks, same day, same command-and-control domain

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: Supply chain, Sophos X-Ops, pipeline, Bitwarden, Checkmarx

item.title: 'Mini Shai-Hulud' supply chain attack targets SAP npm packages
Proof-of-concept exploit available for Linux 'Copy Fail' vulnerability (CVE-2026-31431)
item.description:
Categories: Threat Research

Tags: advisory, Linux, Copy Fail

item.title: AI just became the world's most dangerous exploit writer. Here's why Sophos Endpoint is built to stop it.
item.description:
AI-generated zero-days are here. Sophos Endpoint was architected to stop exploits that have never been seen before — blocking the techniques every attack must use, at the moment of execution, with no signature, no cloud lookup, and no configuration required.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: Endpoint, Sophos Endpoint, AI, Exploits, Zero Days, Mythos

item.title: AI finds the vulnerabilities, but exploiting them is a different problem.
item.description:
How Sophos Endpoint defends in the AI era, and what the public record on Mythos shows.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: Mythos, Sophos Endpoint, Endpoint, Exploits, Zero Days, AI

item.title: Introducing the Sophos Security Services Retainer
item.description:
Prevent more. Respond faster. Spend smarter.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: incident response, Security Services Retainer

item.title: How AI-accelerated threat discovery is reshaping network security
item.description:
As vulnerabilities are discovered faster than ever, organizations must rethink how they reduce exposure and contain risk at the network edge.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: network, AI, Mythos, Firewall, Sophos Firewall

item.title: Donuts and Beagles: Fake Claude site spreads backdoor
item.description:
A malicious imitation of Anthropic’s Claude site leads to DLL sideloading – and a backdoor

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: Claude, Beagle, Backdoor, malvertising, AI, DONUT, DLL sideloading, Sophos X-Ops

item.title: Sophos named a Leader in the KuppingerCole Analysts Leadership Compass for Managed Detection and Response 2026
item.description:
